$comment: Known providers for the frontend-slides capability. Checked in order; first available wins.
description: Create animation-rich HTML presentations from scratch or by converting PowerPoint files.

providers.name: frontend-slides (ECC built-in)
providers.notes: Ships with Claude Code. Full-featured, actively maintained by Anthropic.

providers.name: frontend-design (ECC built-in)
providers.notes: Alternative ECC skill focused on general frontend design. Can produce slide-like output but not specialized for presentations.

fallback_guidance:
No provider found. To get this capability:
1. Update Claude Code — the ECC frontend-slides skill ships with recent versions.
2. Or install a compatible plugin that provides HTML slide generation.
